profile.name: Shivansh Mishra
profile.role: Professional Fresher | ML Engineer, AI Engineer, Data Scientist, and Product Enthusiast
profile.headline: I am a professional fresher student building practical AI and data-driven projects with strong execution and learning agility.
profile.availability: Open to internships, entry-level roles, and graduate opportunities

positioning.intro: As a fresher, I approach projects with a problem-first mindset: understand user context, define scope clearly, and build reliable solutions step by step.
positioning.valueProposition: I combine academic learning with practical projects in machine learning, analytics, and product-oriented execution.

highlights: Built projects across machine learning, data analysis, civic-tech, and campus platforms
Hands-on with Python, SQL, data visualization, and practical ML workflows
Professional fresher with strong problem-solving mindset and product intuition

capabilityCards.title: Web Architecture
capabilityCards.description: Designing complete web systems from responsive frontend to API and persistence layers.

capabilityCards.title: Machine Learning to Product
capabilityCards.description: Building ML models, validating them, and shipping practical interfaces for real users.

capabilityCards.title: Data and Analytics Engineering
capabilityCards.description: Turning raw datasets into decision-ready insights with clear visual storytelling.

capabilityCards.title: Product Delivery and Collaboration
capabilityCards.description: Delivering student-to-production style projects with maintainable structure, version control, and iterative improvements.

featuredProjects.name: Smart Campus OS
featuredProjects.summary: A unified campus platform that centralizes attendance, navigation, complaints, and student services into one digital product.
featuredProjects.challenge: Students and campus teams often use disconnected systems that create delays and confusion.
featuredProjects.impact: Built a streamlined product vision that demonstrates scalable campus digitization with a modern frontend experience.

featuredProjects.name: Nyaya Mitra MVP
featuredProjects.summary: A legal-tech oriented MVP exploring digital support flows for legal guidance and case readiness.
featuredProjects.challenge: Legal accessibility workflows are usually complex and difficult for non-technical users.
featuredProjects.impact: Translated legal assistance concepts into a functional software prototype with practical information flow.

featuredProjects.name: House Price Prediction
featuredProjects.summary: A machine learning workflow that predicts housing prices using structured real-estate attributes.
featuredProjects.challenge: Pricing estimation can be noisy and biased without data-driven modeling.
featuredProjects.impact: Created reproducible prediction experiments and transformed them into user-friendly app experiences.

featuredProjects.name: Unemployment Analysis with Python
featuredProjects.summary: An analytics-focused project exploring unemployment trends through visualization and statistical interpretation.
featuredProjects.challenge: Raw socioeconomic data is hard to interpret without clear analytical narratives.
featuredProjects.impact: Produced interpretable insights and charts that communicate key employment trend shifts effectively.

architecturePillars.title: Problem Discovery
architecturePillars.details: Start with user context, constraints, and measurable success criteria before coding.
architecturePillars.outcome: Builds products that solve real pain points instead of feature overload.

architecturePillars.title: System Design
architecturePillars.details: Define frontend structure, API contracts, and data flow with separation of concerns.
architecturePillars.outcome: Enables faster iteration and easier future scaling.

architecturePillars.title: Build and Integrate
architecturePillars.details: Develop responsive interfaces, robust backend routes, and machine learning or analytics modules.
architecturePillars.outcome: Delivers complete end-to-end functionality with maintainable code.

architecturePillars.title: Measure and Improve
architecturePillars.details: Review behavior, gather feedback, and iterate quickly on performance and UX.
architecturePillars.outcome: Improves reliability and user trust over time.

experienceTimeline.title: Independent ML and Data Projects
experienceTimeline.details: Built and shipped multiple repositories spanning machine learning, analytics, and application workflows.

experienceTimeline.title: B.Tech CSE Fresher (Cloud and ML Specialization)
experienceTimeline.details: Focused on building practical projects that connect academic learning to real-world deployable solutions.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
